description: Garantex begins operating as Russian crypto exchange
OFAC adds Garantex Europe OÜ to SDN list — processing $100M+ in illicit transactions
Related takedown — Garantex flagged as Hydra counterparty
Estonian Financial Intelligence Unit revokes Garantex license
International operation with US Secret Service shuts down Garantex
Grinex appears — same interface same backend same team registered in Kyrgyzstan
OFAC designates Grinex Old Vector (A7A5 issuer) Mendeleev Karavatsky Mira Serda
$405M A7A5 tokens burned/destroyed following sanctions pressure
A7A5 processes ~$93 billion in transactions during 2025 (~1/3 Russia import budget)
~$13.74M USDT stolen from ~70 Grinex/TokenSpot addresses converted to 45.9M TRX via SunSwap
